_description: CS-RabbitMQ stack — upstream images consumed via Dockerfiles and docker-compose. The monitor tracks digests and triggers a release when an upstream image moves.

images.name: python-alpine
images.description: Base image for the rabbitmq-init container (src/rabbitmq-init/Dockerfile)

images.name: cs-rabbitmq
images.description: Published RabbitMQ server image (BAUER GROUP build)

images.name: traefik-certs-dumper
images.description: Optional sidecar that dumps Let's Encrypt certs for AMQPS (docker-compose.traefik.yml)
